trivia: The 70-seat ATR that conquered regional aviation on economics alone: nothing moves 70 people 500 kilometers cheaper. Hundreds fly, and hundreds more became freighters.
Its high wing and slim body read clearly even in a distant optical spot, but your antenna will know it first.
funFacts: The best-selling regional turboprop family in the world.
Freighter conversions are the backbone of island cargo.
